slow_true_angelfish_enchant_no_database_: No database record for this file — only the preview image is shown.
caring_suave_wallaby_adore_longest_side_: Longest side of the grid thumbnail (64–4096)
proud_novel_octopus_zap_track_cameras_le: Track cameras, lenses, and accessories. Suggested makes and models come from your photo metadata.
royal_long_gibbon_exhale_no_items_yet: No items yet. Add your first piece of gear above.
vivid_merry_quail_say_upload_raw_intro: Select one or more files to upload them to the database with the metadata included.
warm_civil_bison_note_upload_saved_banne: Upload saved successfully. Open the home page to see the JPEG preview if conversion succeeded.
quiet_stale_gecko_warn_leave_during_uplo: Uploads are still in progress. Leaving now may interrupt them. Leave anyway?
petty_alert_moth_urge_choose_raw_files: Choose one or more RAW or image files.
blue_still_finch_fail_jpeg_preview: JPEG preview could not be created
wild_crisp_sheep_renew_library_insights_: Library insights from your uploads: storage, gallery mix, geotagging, trends, gear, and ISO.
proof_new_vole_hint_no_photos_yet_charts: Upload some photos to see charts and key figures
jumpy_calm_bee_feast_photos_with_both_la: Photos with both latitude and longitude in EXIF
extra_grassy_mouse_wish_when_files_were_: When files were added to the library
chunky_least_pig_persist_no_monthly_uplo: Not enough dated uploads yet to plot a monthly chart
bad_antsy_eagle_kick_most_common_make_mo: Most common make and model from EXIF
weird_short_moth_gasp_no_camera_make_mod: No camera make/model metadata to chart yet
free_round_hound_yell_distribution_of_is: Distribution of ISO values across photos
dear_stoic_gull_note_settings_intro: Adjust behavior for uploads and previews. Changes apply to new uploads; existing previews are not regenerated automatically. The gallery resolves modal images by format when you change this setting.
soft_slow_bison_say_settings_language_bl: Interface language for LensLocker (Paraglide). The page reloads after you change this.
long_quiet_capybara_settings_appearance_: By default the app follows your system light or dark mode. Use the toggle to pin a look; you can return to the system setting anytime.
blue_bold_moth_note_preview_format_sharp: Grid and lightbox previews use Sharp (JPEG, WebP, AVIF, or PNG). JPEG remains the default; AVIF/WebP need a Sharp build with those encoders.
dull_solid_bream_note_modal_preview_cap: Cap for the large preview in the lightbox and for intermediate RAW decode (256–16384). Higher values use more RAM and disk.
soft_fine_duck_note_png_quality: For PNG, a higher number means less compression (larger files).
slow_wide_crane_note_max_upload_mb: Per-file limit enforced on the server (1–2048 MB).
kind_green_gull_note_saved_upload_pipeli: Saved. New uploads will use these values.
grand_polite_shrew_dashboard_criteria_in: Select any metadata fields or shortcuts. A photo appears under Needs attention if it fails
selected rule. All rules are equal — there is no priority order.
warm_tidy_eel_note_saved_dashboard: Saved. The Needs attention view updates when you open the Dashboard.
level_maroon_nurse_backup_intro_d: and hardware for readability. Backups are named
level_maroon_nurse_backup_intro_f: is a running count. Importing restores the whole database file (gallery and upload records, settings, hardware, auth, etc.); originals and previews on disk are not in the zip.
swift_calm_robin_backup_created_banner: Backup created. It appears in the list below — use Download to save a copy locally.
dark_heavy_oryx_confirm_restore_backup: Restore from this backup? New zips replace the entire SQLite database file (gallery metadata, settings, hardware, auth, etc.). Image files on disk are not inside the zip. Older zips without database.sqlite only replace settings and hardware rows. This cannot be undone.
moody_broad_gadfly_confirm_delete_backup: Delete backup "{filename}" from this server? This cannot be undone.
such_proud_puffin_restore_full_db: Restored full database from zip{stamp_suffix}. Reload or navigate to refresh all data.
calm_bright_dotterel_restore_partial: Imported {app_count} setting row(s) and {hardware_count} hardware item(s){stamp_suffix}.
wide_dull_gull_need_special_camera_incom: Camera make and model both empty
teal_brief_pike_need_special_lens_incomp: Lens make and model both empty
brown_quiet_hare_need_special_shot_date_: Shot date (original) not parseable to a calendar date
soft_glad_snipe_need_special_exposure_mi: Exposure time missing (no seconds value and no text)
steep_mild_crane_gallery_blurb_needs_att: No “needs attention” rules are selected. Choose at least one metadata field or shortcut in Settings → Dashboard.
bold_koala_gallery_blurb_needs_attention: Non-archived photos missing any of: {rules}. Configure in Settings → Dashboard.
soft_plain_goose_gallery_blurb_archived: Photos you moved out of the main gallery (archived).
calm_wide_otter_aria_compact_grid: Switch to compact grid (hide captions under photos)
calm_wide_otter_aria_meta_grid: Switch to grid with captions under photos
noble_clear_frog_bulk_hint: Tap photos to select or deselect. Open the lightbox again by turning off multi-select.
grand_sleek_herring_aria_preview_zoom_pa: Preview: scroll to zoom, drag to pan, double-click image to reset
swift_royal_starling_start_intro: Sign in to manage your library, or create an account to get started.
royal_tidy_lark_layout_title_dashboard_c: All photos — expand sidebar for Needs attention and Archived
royal_tidy_lark_layout_title_review_need: Missing GPS, camera or lens metadata, or shot date
plain_bright_lynx_albums_hub_blurb: Group photos into albums. Membership is stored in the database only — files are not moved on disk.
dull_keen_ibex_album_invalid_blurb: This album could not be found.
round_calm_gull_albums_empty: No albums yet. Select photos in the gallery and choose Add to album, or create one below.
